title: Telemetry, Capacity, Scheduling, Deployment, Backup, and Recovery · Contract Triage
summary: A preserved Go crawl trace contains one plausible scope, URL, robots, transport, body, tokenizer, goquery, frontier, goroutine, Colly callback, report, security, or shutdown defect; identify the first broken invariant before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in operable recoverable Go crawler service and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence…
objectives: Correlate run, policy, URL key, attempt, response, parser, frontier, goroutine, report, and recovery while redacting content and bounding labels.
Measure CPU, heap, allocations, goroutines, open files, sockets, queue age, bytes, throughput, and origin fairness under representative fixtures.
Use one schedule owner, overlap lock, missed-run policy, configuration and artifact identity, owner pause, signal handling, and clean shutdown.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Causal Observability
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug Go team handles case 2202 during a mixed-origin fairness and race rehearsal. Build deterministic Go evidence to reconcile telemetry, capacity, durable schedules, immutable deployment, backup, restore, and safe resume; release evidence binds source, modules, build settings, binary or image, configuration, policy, and restored state; then change one content version, metadata, accessibility, resource, browser-service, or report condition without overclaiming. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser-service, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, x/net/html, goquery, Colly, files, processes, race, load, assistive-technology review, containers, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Correlate run, policy, URL key, attempt, response, parser, frontier, goroutine, report, and recovery while redacting content and bounding labels.

The record names the assumption, applies Causal Observability, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

The Causal Observability record says operable recoverable Go crawler service looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. That claim fails the inspect the failure record evidence boundary for Causal Observability.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Backup Restore
steps.instruction:
Append a compile-ready pure-Go function headed "// Evidence: crawler-go-backup-restore-1wdrzu" that uses case 5206 to reconcile telemetry, capacity, durable schedules, immutable deployment, backup, restore, and safe resume. Return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not open sockets, resolve DNS, import x/net/html, goquery, Colly, or robotstxt, access host files, retain credentials, launch processes or unbounded goroutines, or claim native parser, race, load, accessibility, privacy, legal, container, restore, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Go 1.26.5, x/net 0.57.0, goquery 1.12.0, Colly 2.3.0, robotstxt 1.1.2, original fixtures, custom RoundTrippers, httptest servers, controlled DNS and browser-service environments, race and fuzz runs, subprocesses, inspected binaries and containers, accessibility review, capacity, backup, restore, rollback, legal review, and release gates.
